notes: Apply the accepted patches on baseline_ref in compounding chain order (`order`, verified by `acceptance_seq` + `parent` when present). accepted = correctness+speed PROVEN by the judge, NOT should-merge: only `mergeable:true` entries (byte-identical regime + critic pass) are safe to PR directly; relaxed/pass-risk entries need a human call. Patch text is at patch_path (SEARCH/REPLACE blocks; `base-*` ids are seeded baseline, not candidates). Verify against events.jsonl — it is the source of truth.
